case_title: PEARL WONG ET AL VS. XUE LIN YANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YONG HUI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YONG HUI

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE RETURNED BY POST OFFICE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD;ALL INFORMATION ON GREEN CARD HANDWRITTEN BY POST OFFICE REPLACING ORIGINAL GREEN CARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YONG HUI
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WINNIE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, XUE LIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFFS PEARL WONG AND WINNE WONG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS XUE LIN YANG, LI MEI CHEN, AND YONG HUI YANG ARE PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,310.00 FILED BY WONG, PEARL WONG, WINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, XUE LIN CHEN, LI MEI YANG, YONG HUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, PEARL AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, LI MEI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YONG HUI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, XUE LIN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE RETURNED BY POST OFFICE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, XUE LIN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE RETURNED BY POST OFFICE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, LI MEI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, PEARL WONG, WINNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YANG, XUE LIN CHEN, LI MEI YANG, YONG HUI A CLAIM SEEKING DAMAGES FOR BREACH OF A WRITTEN CONTRACT MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN 4 YEARS FROM THE BREACH. (CAL CODE CIV PROC 337(1).) HERE PLAINTIFFS SEEK THE RETURN OF MONEY THEY SAY WAS PROMISED TO THEM IN 2005. THEIR CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, LI MEI
